mapper.select: SELECT id, name, parent_id, sort_order, description, default_approval_mode, created_at, updated_at FROM device_category WHERE parent_id IS NULL AND name = #{name} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, name, parent_id, sort_order, description, default_approval_mode, created_at, updated_at FROM device_category ORDER BY sort_order ASC, created_at ASC
